arts.ttl: I could have signed for Rangers under Michael Beale – now I'm a £56m PSG sensation who's just dumped Liverpool
arts.sum: Willian Pacho has racked up £56m in transfer fees over his career and Rangers once had realistic hopes of signing him

arts.ttl: Ferguson tells Rangers players to stop being 'too nice'
arts.sum: Rangers head coach Barry Ferguson has told his players they "can't be nice all the time" if they want to beat Fenerbahce and progress in the Europa League.

arts.ttl: Cyriel Dessers snubbed for Nigeria recall despite red-hot Rangers form as Ibrox flop's inclusion sparks inquest
arts.sum: The Gers number nine has been overlooked for the March internationals despite his recent goal glut

arts.ttl: Mourinho racism row rages on as Rangers planning overshadowed by Galatasaray 'dirty alliance' tirade
arts.sum: Galatasaray are demanding that Mourinho is punished for his comments made after the 0-0 draw with Fenerbahce on February 24

arts.ttl: Barry Ferguson LIVE as Fenerbahce out to buck Turkish trend that works in Rangers favour
arts.athr: reporters@dailyrecord.co.uk (Fraser Wilson, Robbie Copeland, Andrew Newport, Anthony Evans)
arts.sum: The boss is talking ahead of the big one as he aims to guide Rangers to the last eight of the Europa League

arts.ttl: Scottish Premiership market values: Maeda & Kühn rise at Celtic, mixed results at Rangers
arts.sum: The Scottish Premiership has received its latest market value update at Transfermarkt and in total no less than 86 players across the Scottish top-flight have seen their market values increase or...

arts.ttl: Kris Boyd airs Rangers Europa League caution and delivers Celtic Park gut feeling
arts.sum: The legendary Ibrox striker has warned his former club that Fenerbahce can't be underestimated

arts.ttl: Celtic Groan Brigade reinvent truth about Rangers but what will they do when Barry wins the Europa League? Hotline
arts.sum: Jose Mourinho and Fenerbahce are in Glasgow for tomorrow's quarter final clash with Rangers. Fraser Wilson takes your calls.

arts.ttl: Leeds 'could become Rangers' FEEDER club' as San Francisco 49ers chiefs hatch plan
arts.sum: Rangers are subject to a takeover led by chiefs at NFL team San Francisco 49ers as they bid to overhaul the Scottish giants, and ex-player Graeme Souness believes Leeds United could soon become a feeder team for the Gers

arts.ttl: Fenerbahce expert raves about Rangers and their enormity as Jose Mourinho warned Ibrox is the Special One
arts.sum: Record Sport spoke to Turkish football expert Kaan Bayazit to get his thoughts on the Europa League blockbuster
